system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.tr_quytrinh_sanpham2_getall3","body":"
CREATE   PROC [dbo].[TR_QUYTRINH_SANPHAM2_GETALL3](@masp nvarchar(200))
AS
BEGIN
	SELECT B.masp, B.mact, B.stt, B.chitiet AS tenct, B.nguyenlieu, 
		B.dayy_tc, B.rong_tc, B.dai_tc,
		MAX(CASE WHEN buoc = 1 THEN A.n_op END) B1,
		MAX(CASE WHEN buoc = 2 THEN A.n_op END) B2,
		MAX(CASE WHEN buoc = 3 THEN A.n_op END) B3,
		MAX(CASE WHEN buoc = 4 THEN A.n_op END) B4,
		MAX(CASE WHEN buoc = 5 THEN A.n_op END) B5,
		MAX(CASE WHEN buoc = 6 THEN A.n_op END) B6,
		MAX(CASE WHEN buoc = 7 THEN A.n_op END) B7,
		MAX(CASE WHEN buoc = 8 THEN A.n_op END) B8,
		MAX(CASE WHEN buoc = 9 THEN A.n_op END) B9,
		MAX(CASE WHEN buoc = 10 THEN A.n_op END) B10,
		MAX(CASE WHEN buoc = 11 THEN A.n_op END) B11,
		MAX(CASE WHEN buoc = 12 THEN A.n_op END) B12,
		MAX(CASE WHEN buoc = 13 THEN A.n_op END) B13,
		MAX(CASE WHEN buoc = 14 THEN A.n_op END) B14,
		MAX(CASE WHEN buoc = 15 THEN A.n_op END) B15,
		MAX(CASE WHEN buoc = 16 THEN A.n_op END) B16,
		MAX(CASE WHEN buoc = 17 THEN A.n_op END) B17,
		MAX(CASE WHEN buoc = 18 THEN A.n_op END) B18,
		MAX(CASE WHEN buoc = 19 THEN A.n_op END) B19,
		MAX(CASE WHEN buoc = 20 THEN A.n_op END) B20
	FROM (
	SELECT A.masp, A.mact, A.buoc, A.quytrinh, A.maymoc, B.n_op, C.tenkhuvuc
	FROM tr_quytrinh_sanpham2 A
		LEFT JOIN trtb_m_op B ON A.quytrinh = B.c_op
		LEFT JOIN tr_khuvuc_sanxuat C ON B.department = C.makhuvuc
	WHERE A.masp = @masp AND A.active = 1) A
		RIGHT JOIN (SELECT * FROM tr_dinhmuc_govan WHERE masp = @masp) B ON A.masp = B.masp AND A.mact = B.mact
	GROUP BY B.masp, B.mact, B.stt, B.chitiet, B.nguyenlieu, B.dayy_tc, B.rong_tc, B.dai_tc
	ORDER BY B.stt
END","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_khuvuc_sanxuat","dbo.tr_quytrinh_sanpham2","dbo.trtb_m_op"],"writesTables":[],"flags":["has-group-by"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
